name: We Will Never Die
overview: An innocent encounter on a Greek Island between two men quickly turns dangerous when one witnesses a drug deal. Back in Germany, stakes are raised further as more men are lured into their dangerous game of cat and mouse- setting in motion a series of events that blurs the line between the hunter and the hunted. A deliciously sexy series from the mind of Tor Iben, 'We Will Never Die' is an International gay action-thriller that will keep you guessing to the bitter end.
